# ROASintheBlack.com

> Free break-even ROAS calculator plus a blog on Google, Meta, and TikTok ad ROAS, MER, and break-even formulas for ecommerce marketers.

## What This Site Does
Provides a free break-even ROAS calculator: enter cost of goods, fulfillment costs, and other variable costs to instantly see the minimum ROAS needed to stay profitable. The blog covers ROAS benchmarks and formulas across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and TikTok Ads, MER (Marketing Efficiency Ratio), and break-even math for ecommerce, lead gen, SaaS, and local businesses.

## Audience
Ecommerce operators and media buyers who need to know the exact ROAS at which their ad spend turns profitable.

## Key Pages
- Homepage / Calculator: https://roasintheblack.com
- Blog: https://roasintheblack.com/blog
- What is ROAS?: https://roasintheblack.com/what-is-roas
- Break-Even ROAS Formula: https://roasintheblack.com/break-even-roas-formula
- About: https://roasintheblack.com/about
- Contact: https://roasintheblack.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://roasintheblack.com/privacy-policy
